name: Prune Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the prunes and cover them with water. Cook slowly until they are tender.
2. Drain, pit, and chop the prunes.
3. Add sugar to the prune juice.
4. Add prunes and lemon juice.
5. Bring to a boil until it reaches the soft ball stage (234 - 238 F).
6. Allow to cool to room temperature.
7. Beat until creamy.
8. Add nuts.
9. Pour into a well-buttered, shallow pan.
10. Cut into squares.
